title: Moonlight Sonata AI Timbre
composerSource: Ludwig van Beethoven, Piano Sonata No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 27 No. 2, first movement; public domain composition used as prompt reference.
prompt: Create a 31 second instrumental loop for Musica VJ Studio based on Beethoven Piano Sonata No. 14 in C sharp minor Opus 27 Number 2 first movement, a public domain classical composition. Use a soft piano arpeggio source, dark wavetable pad, glass FM bell harmonics, warm bowed synth bass, subtle delay, restrained hall reverb. Tempo 72 BPM, C sharp minor, seamless loop, clear tonal attacks and sustained harmonics for a MIDI triggered synth sample bank. No vocals.
